name: cad-fai-worker
description: CAD annotation → FAI report generator with DXF support and multi-format output

scripts.test: echo "No tests configured. To run project checks, run 'npm run build' or use CI build step."

notes.dependencies: exceljs 和 dxf-parser 仅在 Node.js 后端使用，Cloudflare Workers Edge Runtime 不支持
notes.xlsx_support: 使用 CSV 格式（完全 Excel 兼容）或前端 SheetJS 库生成 .xlsx
